description_long: This is a two-story modern house with a distinctive angular, multi-faceted dark gray roof and large, floor-to-ceiling windows on the front and sides. The facade features a symmetrical design with a central double-door entryway, flanked by two prominent bay windows that extend outward. The exterior walls are a mix of light-colored surfaces and glass, giving the house a contemporary and open appearance. Two stylized trees and a paved walkway frame the front, enhancing the curb appeal and providing a sense of scale. The rear of the house is simpler, with fewer windows and a single vent or utility feature visible. The landscaping includes low shrubbery near the entrance, and the overall structure suggests a spacious, upscale urban residence.
description: A modern two-story house with a striking angular roof, large front windows, and a symmetrical entryway, surrounded by minimal landscaping and two stylized trees.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main double-door entry, large bay windows, and two trees flanking the walkway.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the angular roof, a large side window, and the depth of the bay windows.
description_view_2: Rear view with a plain wall, a single vent or utility feature, and no visible entry or landscaping.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing additional windows and the continuation of the angular roof, with both trees visible in the foreground.
attribute_window_arrangement: symmetrical rows with large bay windows and floor-to-ceiling glass panels
attribute_entryway_design: Central double-door entry with steps, flanked by bay windows and minimal landscaping
